加密貨幣與區塊鏈 ·

比特幣失守7.9萬美元 中小型股連動揭露風險資產角色Bitcoin Breaks Below $79K Amid Macro Pain; Bonds May Still Feed a Comeback

https://cointelegraph.com/markets/bitcoin-slides-below-79k-macro-fears-can-fixed-income-outflows-save-it?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

  • 價格在8.2萬美元附近遇壓後急挫，回落至7萬餘美元水準，並與羅素小型股指數走勢貼齊，顯示宏觀因素是主軸。
  • 與中小型股的高度相關，意味當前市場把比特幣視為追高風險的標的而非傳統避險工具。
  • 固定收益市場恐慌性賣壓表面上不利風險胃納，卻可能在數週內釋放資金，間接為比特幣反彈創造契機。
  • 永續合約資金費率跌入負區並接近零，顯示追價做多槓桿缺席，對突破8萬美元以上欠缺信心。
  • 投資人因中東情勢緊繃與股市估值過熱議論傾向在週末前降曝險，強化近期的避險性賣壓。

比特幣在宏觀與地緣不確定下失守7萬餘美元，走勢貼齊小型股說明其風險資產定位。固定收益被拋售可能在未來數週釋放資金，抵銷部分賣壓；永續合約資金費率偏弱反映槓桿多方觀望。

  • BTC dropped under $79K after stalling near $82K and tracked Russell 2000 futures, tying the slide tightly to macro risk.
  • The parallel with small-cap equities suggests BTC is traded as risk-on beta rather than a defensive hedge today.
  • A stressed bond market ironically frees cash that could underpin a rebound for Bitcoin over the next several weeks.
  • Perpetual funding flipped deeply negative near flat, signalling absent bullish leverage despite repeated breakout tries.
  • Geopolitical anxiety and lofty equity valuations led managers to lighten positions before the weekend, adding headline risk-off flow.

Bitcoin fell below $79K as macro weighed on risk assets alongside Russell 2000 moves; stressed bonds may fuel a rebound.
